problem_text_cn: 1. 阻尼振动问题：（a）单摆（摆球密度为水的α倍，受粘滞阻力f=−γv），求低阻尼摆动条件；（b）水平导电回路（R、L已知）中导体棒（质量m、长l）以v₀运动，证明速度变化为阻尼振动，给出低/临界/高阻尼条件；2. 受迫振动动力学方程$\ddot{x}+2 eta \dot{x}+\omega_0^2 x=h cos p t$，（a）导出暂态过程通解；（b）求t→∞时的稳态解及振幅A、相位差φ。
problem_text_en: 1. Damped vibration problems：（a）A simple pendulum（the density of the pendulum bob is α times that of water，subject to viscous resistance f=−γv），find the condition for low-damping oscillation；（b）A conductor rod（mass m、length l）in a horizontal conductive loop（R、L known）moves at v₀，prove that the velocity change is damped vibration，and give the low/critical/high damping conditions；2. Forced vibration dynamic equation$\ddot{x}+2 eta \dot{x}+\omega_0^2 x=h cos p t$，（a）Derive the general solution of the transient process；（b）Find the steady-state solution as t→∞，and the amplitude A、phase difference φ.
problem_solution_cn: （1）阻尼振动条件：- （a）单摆：等效重力加速度g'=(1−1/α)g，低阻尼条件β<ω₀（β=γ/(2m)，ω₀=√(g'/l)），即l<4m²(1−1/α)g/γ²；- （b）导体棒：回路方程与牛顿定律联立得$\ddot{v}+(R/L)\dot{v}+(B²l²/(mL))v=0$，低阻尼R<2Bl√(L/m)，临界阻尼R=2Bl√(L/m)，高阻尼R>2Bl√(L/m)。（2）受迫振动解：- （a）暂态解=齐次解+特解，齐次解分高/临界/低阻尼三种形式，特解x*=Acos(pt+φ)，通解为三者叠加；- （b）稳态解x=Acos(pt+φ)，振幅A=h/√[(ω₀²−p²)²+4β²p²]，相位差φ=arctan[−2βp/(ω₀²−p²)]。
problem_solution_en: （1）Damped vibration conditions：- （a）Simple pendulum：equivalent gravitational acceleration g'=(1−1/α)g，low-damping condition β<ω₀（β=γ/(2m)，ω₀=√(g'/l)），i.e. l<4m²(1−1/α)g/γ²；- （b）Conductor rod：Combining the loop equation and Newton's law to get$\ddot{v}+(R/L)\dot{v}+(B²l²/(mL))v=0$，low damping R<2Bl√(L/m)，critical damping R=2Bl√(L/m)，high damping R>2Bl√(L/m)。（2）Forced vibration solutions：- （a）Transient solution=homogeneous solution+particular solution，homogeneous solution has three forms（high/critical/low damping），particular solution x*=Acos(pt+φ)，general solution is the superposition of the three；- （b）Steady-state solution x=Acos(pt+φ)，amplitude A=h/√[(ω₀²−p²)²+4β²p²]，phase difference φ=arctan[−2βp/(ω₀²−p²)]。
problem_answer: ight) g}{\gamma^2}$；（b）低阻尼$R<2 B l \sqrt{ rac{L}{m}{}}$，临界阻尼$R=2 B l \sqrt{ rac{L}{m}{}}$，高阻尼$R>2 B l \sqrt{ rac{L}{m}{}}$；2.（a）暂态通解见解析；（b）稳态解$x=A cos(pt+\phi)$，振幅$A= rac{h}{\sqrt{(\omega_0^2 - p^2)^2 + 4 eta^2 p^2}{}}$，相位差$\phi=arctan rac{-2 eta p}{\omega_0^2 - p^2}{$}
